title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: How Anthropic’s Mythos has rewritten Firefox’s approach to cybersecurity
summary: Security researchers at Mozilla say Anthropic's Mythos has unearthed a wealth of high-severity bugs in Firefox.

title: Prediction Market Kalshi Boosts Valuation to $22 Billion With Fresh $1 Billion Investment
summary: Kalshi has another billion dollars to play with as the U.S. prediction market leader continues to grow at a rapid pace.

title: India’s first space tech unicorn emerges as Skyroot gears up for orbital launch
summary: Skyroot's valuation has more than doubled since 2023 as the Indian rocket startup prepares for the country's first private orbital launch.

title: Google Found a Way to Make Local AI Up to 3x Faster—No New Hardware Required
summary: Google's new Multi-Token Prediction drafters can make Gemma 4 run up to 3x faster on your own hardware—no cloud required, and no quality lost.

title: China’s Moonshot AI raises $2B at $20B valuation as demand for open source AI skyrockets
summary: Moonshot's annualized recurring revenue topped $200 million in April, driven by rapid growth in paid subscriptions and API usage.

title: OpenAI前董事：馬斯克主動捐精 兩人已有四個孩子
summary: OpenAI前董事齊利斯出庭作證，透露她與伊隆·馬斯克已育有4名子女。2020年馬斯克主動提議捐贈精子，她因健康因素接受。兩人約十年前曾有過一次「短暫」的戀情，但生子時並非戀愛關係。

title: Barry Diller trusts Sam Altman. But ‘trust is irrelevant’ as AGI nears, he says.
summary: Barry Diller defended OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, while warning that AGI remains an unpredictable force needing guardrails.

title: Insurance startup Corgi hits $1.3B valuation 4 months after its Series A
summary: Corgi announced on Wednesday a $160 million Series B, led by TCV, valuing the startup at $1.3 billion.

title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Will Help Power Anthropic's Claude in Surprise AI Deal
summary: Elon Musk’s combined company of SpaceX and xAI will help boost Anthropic with a deal to provide compute for Claude AI models.

title: Robinhood’s venture fund IPO attracted 150,000+ retail investors, CEO says
summary: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev says more than 150,000 retail investors joined the fintech’s new venture fund, which offers exposure to private tech companies like OpenAI, Stripe, Databricks, and Oura before they go public.

title: Ondo, JPMorgan, Mastercard and Ripple Team to Settle Tokenized Treasuries on XRP Ledger
summary: Major financial institutions use XRP Ledger to demonstrate blockchain's ability to settle tokenized Treasuries across borders in seconds.

title: OKX to Launch OpenAI, SpaceX and Anthropic Perpetual Futures in Pre-IPO Trading Push
summary: Crypto exchange OKX will offer synthetic exposure to private AI and tech company valuations through derivatives contracts.
